title: Sudoku Universe / 数独宇宙
description:
Infinite fun

Об игреSudoku (数独 sūdoku, digit-single) - is a logic-based, combinatorial number-placement puzzle. The objective is to fill a 9×9 grid with digits so that each column, each row, and each of the nine 3×3 subgrids that compose the grid (also called "boxes", "blocks", or "regions") contains all of the digits from 1 to 9. 

• 150 brain-teasing Sudoku puzzles

• Random level generator

• Level's progress save

• Beautiful minimalist design, multiple color themes

• 10 ambient relaxing soundtracks

• Achievements with Latin and Cyrillic characters

• Trading Cards, Badge, Emoticons and Backgrounds

• Steam Cloud support
description_short: Making the best Sudoku game on Steam.
